title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Om Book Shop

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Om Book Shop
jsonLd.description:
Om Book Shop is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
